objectives.description: Record both colliding files' basenames, sizes, sha256, mtimes
Extract and record Subject/Message-ID headers, confirm match to report
Back up .mbsyncstate, confirm single 34 15 S mapping
Reproduce mbsync gmail failure as before-state
Confirm mail-sync timer idle / stop it for the mutation window

notes: All files under ~/Mail were read-only in this phase (no maildir mutation). No file removed from .All_Mail/cur. Timer (mail-sync-timer.timer) stopped via systemctl --user stop; will re-enable in Phase 4.
